summary.zh: AlexNet 以深度卷积网络、GPU 训练、ReLU、数据增强和 dropout 在 ImageNet 上取得突破性结果。
summary.en: AlexNet achieved a breakthrough on ImageNet by combining deep convolutional networks, GPU training, ReLU, data augmentation, and dropout.

description.zh: 2012 年，Alex Krizhevsky、Ilya Sutskever 和 Geoffrey Hinton 的 AlexNet 在 ImageNet 竞赛中显著降低图像分类错误率，使深度卷积神经网络成为现代计算机视觉的核心路线。
description.en: In 2012, Alex Krizhevsky, Ilya Sutskever, and Geoffrey Hinton introduced AlexNet, which substantially reduced ImageNet classification error and made deep convolutional networks central to modern computer vision.

notes.zh: Step 3 样例事件，来源于 legacy deep-learning 与 AI100 数据。
notes.en: Step 3 sample event sourced from legacy deep-learning and AI100 data.
